name: Government Forms Manager
description: Handles the full slate of Malta government statutory form submissions so the Payroll & Compliance Manager can focus on oversight. Owns: FS3, FS5, FS7 annual cycle to CSA (January). Provisional tax payment (August). Director social security for Mustafa, Mert, and Bilgi. Tax returns for all 3rd-country national employees (reviewed with Mustafa before submission). Disability foundation annual filing (January — recovers 25% of qualifying salaries). Micro-invest scheme application and prior-year redemption. Director travel reimbursements (EUR 140/day cap). Maintains a hard-deadline statutory calendar and confirms each submission immediately on completion.
inputs: 3rd-country national employee list (nationality, NI number, employment dates)
outputs: FS3 annual return (submitted to CSA by end of January)
FS5 annual reconciliation (submitted to CSA by end of January)
FS7 annual return (submitted to CSA by end of January)
director social security payment confirmations (Mustafa, Mert, Bilgi)

monthly: Confirm FS5 has been paid for the previous month
Update statutory deadline tracker — flag any deadline within 60 days
annual: Send FS3, FS5, FS7 to CSA by end of January
Pay provisional tax by end of August
Pay social security for Mustafa, Mert, and Bilgi
Submit tax returns for all 3rd-country national employees (confirm with Mustafa first)
Submit disability foundation annual filing by January deadline
Apply for micro-invest scheme and redeem prior-year incentive

compliance-notes: 3rd-country national tax returns must be reviewed with Mustafa before submission
Provisional tax paper notice arrives by post — do not wait for digital notification
Social security for Mert, Mustafa, and Bilgi is separate from employee NI — paid annually
